name: write_memory
description: Write or append to your personal memory files in your home's memory/ directory. Use this to record what you learned, decisions made, or context to carry forward. Safer than write_file for memory because it automatically prefixes the path with your home's memory/ directory — you can't accidentally write outside it. The file is created if it doesn't exist.

mode.description: 'write' overwrites the file, 'append' adds to the end (default: append)
